rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Walk-away test — does the student leave the chair while the agent works?
50% magic rule — at least three post-M2 modules must produce holy-shit moments.
Trust the agentic design — no human backstops.
Exercise quality ladder — target 8, design 9 for peaks.
(Moved to check_cross_module.md §1.)
One exercise = one bounded activity.
Modules are composable across training variants.
Three-level completeness — strategy → runtime artifact → sendable asset.
Pattern-recognition LOs need n≥2 instances with contrast.
Progression-with-variations is the training's spine.
Student agency — adults decide; opportunity ≠ compulsion.
Delegation boundaries — student brings, Claude screens.
Split a mega-exercise when phases are distinct skills.
Artifact-realism check — every named tool/skill/path must exist and be available.
Teach the principle and the technique — default.
Auto-fire sim + eval after significant rewrite.
Forcing functions stay, scripted reactions go — and forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
Corporate infra is nice-to-have, never a forcing function.
Personal-first, team promotion via human conversation.
Measure silent failure, not just friction.
Don't pre-set categories before the experiment runs.
Verification layers sample different error distributions.
Cheap-before-expensive verification-ladder ordering.
A rule in memory that does not force is worse than no rule.
Short skeptical pushbacks on a done declaration are re-verify triggers.
Cohort-delivered exercises run on trainer-paced concurrent execution, not sequential.
Host-skill is optional; default cohort is no host-skill.
Reflection beats prefer in-chat over file-write.
Classroom is the default delivery mode; body teaches the work, trainer manages the room.
(Moved to check_cross_module.md §2.)
Eval is a fixed yardstick; the thing measured is what learns.
Reading burden for verification is banned — Claude audits Claude.
Self-report and self-audit charity — verify at the artifact.
Offered structures need a forced-engagement mechanic.
Source-type blindness on ingestion — slideware ingests shallowly.
When task selection drives the learning outcome, name floor AND ceiling.
Audience tier determines authoring substrate.
Verification machinery needs a smoke-test before being trusted.
Context-loading tiers as staged progression.
(Moved to check_cross_module.md §3.)
Removals are strategic — ask before cutting.
(Moved to check_cross_module.md §4.)
Symmetric visible-mechanics flow > runtime fork when dual-runtime constraints break the agentic move.
Load-bearing platform feature gets no fallback — gate or redesign.
Eval / judge architecture — partition by evidence source, not by criterion count.
Plug points + UX — the file must be both plug-able and operable.
Per-exercise leap test — name three observable Monday-morning outcomes.
(Moved to check_cross_module.md §5.)
Per-phase failure mode + escape hatch — every forcing function names its dominant failure.
Heavy fan-out prompts get a body-side recovery callout.
Save belongs with authoring, not loading.
Convenience-driven prompts with known shape-bias get body-side acknowledgment callouts.
Deliberate-antipattern prompts are class-judge exempt — flagged-by-design.
Session widget — source shape and placement by learning flow.
Pre-action framing blocks don't preview the prompt's payoff.
(Moved to check_cross_module.md §6.)
(Moved to check_cross_module.md §7.)
Engineer-audience audit fixes default to body callout, not forcing function.
Multi-session ships as packaging, not as a new taught primitive.
/clear is a tool with a purpose, not a ceremony.
